source_pr.title: util/chunk: migrate test-infra to testify for chunk_test, chunk_util_test
source_pr.body:
### What problem does this PR solve?

Problem Summary: 
part of https://github.com/pingcap/tidb/issues/26170
migrated `chunk_test` and `chunk_util_test`. Others in a following PR

**Only trivial migration work, no semantic changes!**

### Release note <!-- bugfixes or new feature need a release note -->

```release-note
None
```

symptoms: -// when the Insert() function is called parallelly, the data race on a byte
failure_signature: -// when the Insert() function is called parallelly, the data race on a byte
root_cause_explanation: This PR is a test-infrastructure migration/refactor for util/chunk tests (go-check to testify) and related test helpers. The primary risk is in test suite setup/teardown and assertion conversion during framework migration, rather than a specific product flakiness root cause.
fix_pattern: Migrate util/chunk tests from go-check to testify (update test suite structure and assertions) to reduce framework-related flakiness risk.

evidence: evidence: -// when the Insert() function is called parallelly, the data race on a byte

files: executor/cte.go, executor/executor.go, executor/explain.go, executor/infoschema_reader.go, executor/insert_common.go, executor/merge_join.go, executor/show.go, executor/union_scan.go, expression/bench_test.go, store/mockstore/unistore/cophandler/analyze.go, util/chunk/chunk.go, util/chunk/chunk_test.go, util/chunk/chunk_util_test.go, util/chunk/column.go, util/chunk/column_test.go, util/chunk/list.go, util/chunk/list_test.go, util/chunk/main_test.go, util/chunk/pool.go, util/chunk/row.go

Patch series analyzed; see patch_url.
